name: spotify-playlists
description: Get the user's Spotify playlists (owned and followed). Use for questions like 'show my playlists', 'what playlists do I have?', 'list my Spotify playlists'. Returns playlist names, track counts, and IDs. Use spotify-playlist-tracks to get the songs in a specific playlist.

output.description: items array of playlist objects, each with name, id, tracks.total (track count), owner, and public flag.
